positive: A vibrant, symmetrical composition featuring an abstract biomechanical owl nesting on a geometric, moss-covered crystal outcrop. The owl has intricate, feathered armor composed of iridescent beetle wings and polished obsidian segments. It is surrounded by delicate, bioluminescent jungle flora, glowing in shades of teal, emerald, and deep violet. Use stark, clean silhouettes and heavy contrast, emphasizing the interplay between organic and mechanical forms. Style should be a fusion of Art Deco symmetry and futuristic nature art, suitable for a high-detail apparel print. Flat vector-graphic quality with deep saturation, cinematic, centered, highly defined, intricate details.
negative: low resolution, blurry, fuzzy, noisy, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logos, trademarks, excessive noise, washed out, grayscale, out of focus
